title: astragalus leptophysus
intro: Astragalus leptophysus, also known as the lesser milk-vetch or bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus leptophysus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and supporting cardiovascular health. Astragalus leptophysus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
